Indicative Term Sheet – Acquisition of Power Cables Division of Meridian Wires Limited by Navayana Capital Private Limited.
Parties and listing: Meridian Wires Limited (NSE-listed; ticker MRWL, fictional) and Navayana Capital Private Limited (together, the Parties).
Transaction structure and consideration: Slump sale of division followed by preferential allotment under SEBI ICDR; indicative EV INR 480 crore, subject to working capital adjustment and SEBI LODR disclosures.
Approvals and timeline: Shareholder approval (Sections 180/188, Companies Act, 2013), NSE/BSE in-principle approvals, and RBI consents if applicable; long-stop 31 March 2026.
Financing: INR 150 crore equity by Navayana Growth Fund I and INR 330 crore rupee term loan from Indus Delta Bank (fictional), with escrow managed by Suryoday Trustee Services.
Confidentiality and UPSI: All projections, draft board notes, and pricing are Unpublished Price Sensitive Information under SEBI (PIT) Regulations; trading window to remain closed until public disclosure; insider list to be maintained.
Data and privacy: Each Party is a data fiduciary under the DPDPA and will obtain consent for shareholder and employee data; no Aadhaar numbers will be collected from public users; children (under 18) require verifiable guardian consent.
Primary contact (clustered identifiers): Mr. Aakash Dev (CFO, Meridian Wires Limited), DOB 12-11-1989, based in Mumbai, using Redmi Note 10 on office Wi‑Fi (IP 10.22.45.9), email aakash.dev@meridianwires.in, employee code MWL-3407, PAN ABZPD3X9QZ (fictional/invalid), UPI dev.aakash-1@payz, VC session ID MWL-TX-2025-07.
KYC and identifiers: PAN/GSTIN of counterparties to be uploaded post signing via secure portal; reconciliation files show bank account suffix 9021 only, with no holder name; placeholders permitted in drafts.
Diligence: Limited clean-room access to data room; generic log entry shows Android 12 handset model Kaveri-9 from Pune at 14:02 IST without any name or account ID, which by itself is not identifiable.
Conditions precedent: No material adverse change; transfer of key supply contracts; novation of bank guarantees; confirmation that no child-specific profiles are stored, only age bands 13–17 with consent flags.
Covenants: Promoter Ms. Kavita Rao to serve as Non-Executive Director for 12 months post-closing; non-compete 24 months; non-solicit of senior engineers in Chennai and Vadodara.
Closing mechanics: Consideration split 90% at completion and 10% escrow for 12 months; stamp duty and registration charges shared equally; all UPSI to be published via NSE/BSE before any investor communication.
Representations and warranties: Compliance with DPDPA notice-and-consent, no unlawful processing of Aadhaar or PAN; accuracy of financials; title to assets; absence of undisclosed related party transactions.
Notices and contacts: dealdesk@navayanacap.in and cs@meridianwires.in for formal communications; phone calls allowed for logistics but WhatsApp/SMS not permitted for any UPSI.
Dispute resolution: Governing law India; arbitration at Mumbai under MCIA Rules; courts at Mumbai to have supervisory jurisdiction.
